name: codesafer
description: AI code security scanner MCP server. Detects 9 categories of threats in AI-generated code using static analysis plus CodeBERT deep learning.

tools.name: scan_file
tools.description: Scan a single file for hidden malicious code patterns

tools.name: scan_directory
tools.description: Recursively scan a directory for security threats

tools.name: scan_rules_file
tools.description: Scan AI config files for Rules File Backdoor attacks
